template_info.name: OpenChronicle World Template
template_info.description: Geography, regions, and cultural foundations for storytelling environments
template_info.purpose: Provides physical world structure with regions, cultural elements, and environmental features
template_info.optional_fields: Any field marked with '_optional': true can be safely deleted
template_info.usage: Delete entire fields/sections with '_optional': true, or just the '_optional' key to make field required

import_adaptability.arrays_expandable: All arrays can contain any number of entries - template shows minimum structure
import_adaptability.dynamic_regions: Regional structure can expand to accommodate any number of areas
import_adaptability.flexible_structure: Import processes should expand arrays and adapt field counts dynamically

application_behavior.empty_optional_fields: Application will automatically ignore optional fields that are empty, null, or contain only placeholder values
application_behavior.unused_optional_fields: Optional fields left as {{PLACEHOLDER}} values will be treated as unused and ignored
application_behavior.processing_logic: Only populated optional fields with actual content will be processed by the application
application_behavior.conditional_requirements: Identifier fields (name, region_id, etc.) are required only when their containing object is used. Whole sections can be deleted if unused.

regions._comment: Array can expand - add as many regions as needed

notable_locations._comment: Array can expand - add as many locations as needed

inhabitants._comment: Array can expand - add as many inhabitant groups as needed

connections._comment: Array can expand - add as many connected regions as needed

languages._comment: Array can expand - add as many languages as needed

currencies._comment: Array can expand - add as many currencies as needed

calendar._comment: Array can expand - add as many calendar systems as needed

months._comment: Array can expand - add as many months as needed

special_days._comment: Array can expand - add as many special days as needed

festivals._comment: Array can expand - add as many festivals as needed

magical_elements._comment: Array can expand - add as many magical elements as needed

natural_wonders._comment: Array can expand - add as many natural wonders as needed

important_history._comment: Array can expand - add as many historical events as needed
